summary: The diff implements store management backend (REQ-1), frontend hooks (REQ-2), StoreListManager integration (REQ-4), and StoreSelector integration (REQ-5). However, REQ-3 (StoreFormModal integration with toast notifications and create/edit mode logic) is not directly evidenced in the diff, and several specific acceptance criteria have gaps.

missing_requirements.requirement: Integrate the StoreFormModal component into the vendor UI: connect it to useCreateStore and useUpdateStore hooks so vendors can create and edit stores via the modal form.
missing_requirements.reason: The diff does not show any changes to StoreFormModal or StoreListManager source files. The frontend-file-summaries.txt does not mention StoreFormModal being wired up. The StoreListManager is rendered in VendorDashboard, but no evidence exists that StoreFormModal is connected to useCreateStore/useUpdateStore with success/error toasts, pre-population of form data for editing, or creation mode.

missing_requirements.requirement: toggleStoreActive flips the active boolean on a store record
missing_requirements.reason: The hooks in useQueries.ts use useDeactivateStore and useActivateStore rather than a single toggleStoreActive method. The backend main.mo is truncated so it is unclear if toggleStoreActive is implemented as a single method; the hook naming diverges from the spec.

missing_requirements.requirement: useToggleStoreActive mutation calls the backend and invalidates the stores query on success
missing_requirements.reason: The file summary for useQueries.ts lists useDeactivateStore and useActivateStore as separate hooks rather than a single useToggleStoreActive hook as specified.

missing_requirements.requirement: Product management and other vendor panels receive the selected store ID as context where applicable
missing_requirements.reason: VendorDashboard tracks selectedStoreId in state and passes it to StoreSelector, but there is no evidence that the selected store ID is passed as a prop to VendorPayoutsPanel, VendorOrderHistory, VendorAuctionsPanel, or any product management panel.

hallucinated_features.description: Separate useDeactivateStore and useActivateStore hooks instead of a single useToggleStoreActive hook
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request specifies a single useToggleStoreActive hook. The diff introduces two separate hooks (useDeactivateStore and useActivateStore) which were not requested.
The build request does not mention a useStoreById hook; it only requests useCreateStore, useUpdateStore, useGetStoresByVendor, and useToggleStoreActive. useStoreById is an extra hook not in the spec.

hallucinated_features.description: migration.mo generated even though OldActor and NewActor have identical shapes with an identity run function
hallucinated_features.reason: The constraint states 'Generate migration.mo only if stable backend state shape changes require it.' The migration.mo run function simply returns the old state unchanged, indicating no actual shape change required migration.
